description: Add try-catch around atob() in upload_file to provide a user-friendly error message for invalid base64 content.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/discord && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Wrap atob in try-catch with ToolError.validation
userStories.description: The upload_file tool calls atob(params.content) without error handling. Invalid base64 throws a DOMException with no helpful message.
acceptanceCriteria: atob() is wrapped in a try-catch that throws ToolError.validation with a message like 'Invalid base64 content — ensure the content is valid base64-encoded data'
